error_signature: Using the item method doesn’t work with pinned data
title: Item method error with pinned data in Lead / Campanha node
symptom: The workflow occasionally fails with an error stating that the item method doesn’t work with pinned data, despite the node not being pinned. This happens inconsistently during executions.
applies_when: Attempting to access data using the item method
not_this_if: The node is pinned during execution
The workflow does not use the item method
root_cause: The error occurs because the workflow is trying to access data from a previous node that is no longer relevant due to the execution context changing. When the last node is a wait node, it does not provide the expected data structure for the item method.
fix_steps: Ensure that the node is not pinned during execution
Avoid using the item method directly on data that may not be available due to execution context changes
Consider restructuring the workflow to handle data retrieval more reliably
agent_instruction: Avoid using the item method on data from nodes that may not be relevant in the current execution context.
